response.justification: Exceptional technical depth across all hard requirements, but severe seniority mismatch. A Staff engineer with 13+ years of full-stack experience applying for an entry-level junior role without clear motivation for this career step-back raises retention concerns and questions about role satisfaction. Recent hire at re:cinq (April 2025) compounds questions about stability.
strengths: Advanced TypeScript and full-stack expertise with React, Node.js, AWS, and clean architecture practices
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship through TDD, pair programming, and teaching workshops
AI/LLM infrastructure experience and knowledge of Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and deployment systems
concerns: Extreme seniority mismatch—Staff-level engineer with 13+ years seeking entry-level position without clear motivation
Just hired at re:cinq in April 2025; unexplained reason for job search only months into current role
Career trajectory shows consistent progression to senior and staff roles; junior position contradicts established pattern
